rulings.Case Title: ERIC BOICE et al VS. HARCOURT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILIT et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 18, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT HARCOURT GROUP, LLC and SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC.'s Motion For Stay Of Proceedings Pending Appeal GRANTED. This action is stayed pending appeal. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARKETHA MUNIR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 18, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF ARKETHA MUNIR's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal OFF CALENDAR. "As a general rule, a trial court is without jurisdiction to vacate its judgment pending an appeal therefrom." Valvo v. University of California (1977) 67 Cal.App.3d 887. Notice of Appeal filed on April 7, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FERDINAND A. POSAS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, A UTAH CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 18, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing that the application was complete (CC 2923.6(h)) and to allege damages; demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: standing, and unlawful/unfair/fraudulent prongs. Demurer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
